title: Youtube Poop: Mike and Eric Awesome Show, Great Dog!
description:
Edit: I came in 2nd! :D  1st place went to Imaperson, but it was well deserved.  And puseechunt's entry was awesome too.  Check them out whenever you get the time!

This is an entry for Eric Striffler's Video Remix contest.  If I win, I get a $100 Best Buy Gift Card! :D

Just think, with $100 I can finally get that
